metadata.description: Expanded labeled dataset for CogniAuth decision classifier. Targets: label (category), risk_level, emotional_tone, reversibility.
metadata.note: Original 178 samples merged back (category+risk labels only); tone/reversibility trained on the 531 fully-labeled samples.
